Services

Three services. Clear prices. Booked in under a minute.

No menus of add-ons, no surcharges hidden in fine print. Choose the level of care, pick a time, and we confirm by text.

The Maintenance Wash

About 1 hour · at the shop or your estate

from $95 per visit

A one hundred percent hand wash for cars already in our care. Weekly and monthly schedules keep every car ready to drive.

Book online
Most requested

The Signature Detail

Half a day · interior and exterior

from $495

The full treatment we have refined since 1996. Paint hand washed, decontaminated, and waxed. Every interior surface cleaned and conditioned.

Book online

Correction & Ceramic

1 to 3 days · by consultation

from $1,500

Machine polishing removes years of swirl and haze, then the paint is sealed under a warrantied ceramic coating. Every project begins with an inspection.

Request a consultation

Recent work

The finish speaks for itself.

A client's Mercedes SL
Ceramic gloss · clouds in the paint

Exceptional cars

Exotic is not an upcharge here. It is the job description.

Other shops price exotics as a risk. We have spent thirty years with the materials that make these cars different, and it shows in the work.

  • Alcantara and suede headliners
  • Factory matte and satin paint
  • Exposed carbon fiber
  • Nappa and semi-aniline leather
  • Concours and show preparation
FerrariLamborghiniMaybachRolls-RoycePorscheBentley
A client's Porsche
Interior day · a client's Cayenne

Collection Care

One relationship. Every car covered.

Standing care for the whole collection, on a schedule, at your estate. The service our longest clients have quietly had for years, now with a name.

  • Scheduled visits, weekly or monthly
  • Unmarked arrival, familiar with gated communities
  • Every car kept detailed and ready to drive
  • One text to your detailer, not a call center
Request Collection Care
Mark Shaw

About

The same hands since 1996.

Mark Shaw founded Wax On Wax Off in Rancho Santa Fe in 1996, and thirty years later he still works on every car himself. Most of his clients have been with him for a decade or more. They come for the work. They stay for Mark.

"No shortcuts. No crew of strangers. Just the correct process, every time."
Mark Shaw · Founder
Mark on ceramic coating · to be replaced with the original file

Trusted by the people hardest to impress.
